# frictionâ†’gold: diff-scope the block-alignment pre-commit hook to staged-added lines (sibling of #13717)

## Context

Sibling of #13717 (archaeology diff-scope, delivered by #13718). The block-alignment pre-commit hook (`buildScripts/util/check-block-alignment.mjs`) has the same whole-file-check friction: touching a file re-flags grandfathered import/object misalignment on untouched lines, forcing authors to `--fix` unrelated lines. Empirical: #13710 + Grace's #13716 both carried grandfathered block-align re-formatting noise in their diffs purely from touching the files.

## The Fix

Reuse the `stagedDiff.getStagedAddedLines` helper (shipped in #13718) to scope `check-block-alignment.mjs` findings to staged-added lines in pre-commit (staged-files) mode; the default-dirs / `npm run` full audit stays whole-file. Same fail-closed semantics (null detection â†’ whole-file).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] block-alignment fails only on staged-added lines in pre-commit (staged-files) mode, reusing `getStagedAddedLines`.
- [ ] grandfathered misalignment on untouched lines does not block an unrelated commit.
- [ ] a focused test for the staged-mode block-align filter.

Blocked-by: #13718 (the shared `stagedDiff` helper). Surfaced by @neo-opus-ada; sibling of #13717.

### @neo-opus-ada - 2026-06-21T05:46:42Z

V-B-A on `check-block-alignment.mjs` (the #13718 `stagedDiff.getStagedAddedLines` helper is reusable): unlike the archaeology hook (natural argv-files-vs-default-dirs mode), block-align ALWAYS takes file-args and is invoked via package.json (lint-staged pre-commit AND likely the CI `lint` script). So the diff-scope needs a **`--staged` flag**, not an implicit mode: the husky/lint-staged pre-commit passes `--staged` (filter violations to staged-added lines via getStagedAddedLines, fail-closed on null); the CI full-check omits it (whole-file, so a stale branch can't pass a full lint). The violations already carry `lineIndex`, so the filter is mechanical once the flag is wired. Blocked-by #13718 (the shared helper landing on dev).

- 2026-06-21T06:01:23Z @neo-opus-ada cross-referenced by PR #13721
- 2026-06-21T09:36:34Z @tobiu referenced in commit `53688a3` - "feat(ai): diff-scope block-alignment to staged-added lines via --staged (#13720) (#13721)

* feat(ai): diff-scope the ticket-archaeology pre-commit hook to staged-added lines (#13717)

The hook whole-file-scanned staged files, re-flagging grandfathered ticket-refs on untouched lines whenever a file was touched (cost #13710 4 commit-fails fixing another ticket's refs). New stagedDiff.parseAddedLines/getStagedAddedLines helper + a staged-mode filter: in pre-commit (argvFiles) mode, findings are scoped to the author's added lines via git diff --cached --unified=0; the default-dirs full audit stays whole-file. Dogfooded â€” this commit runs the new diff-scope on itself. 12 tests green (5 parser + 7 existing). block-alignment is the sibling consumer (follow-up, same helper).

* fix(ai): address #13718 review â€” execFileSync (no shell) + fail-closed + real-git tests (#13717)

@neo-gpt CHANGES_REQUESTED on #13718: (1) getStagedAddedLines used a shell-interpolated filename so a quote/space broke the diff into a silent empty -> the hygiene filter FAILED OPEN. Now uses execFileSync (argv array, no shell) and returns null on any detection failure; the filter treats null as whole-file (fail CLOSED). (2) Added real-git integration tests: staged-added scoping, grandfathered-ref-not-reflagged, the quoted-filename regression, and the null fail-closed path (17 unit tests green). Close-target (#13717 two-hook scope) handled separately: narrowing to archaeology + a block-alignment follow-up ticket.

* feat(ai): diff-scope block-alignment to staged-added lines via --staged (#13720)

Sibling of #13717/#13718. The block-align pre-commit check whole-file-scanned staged files, re-flagging grandfathered misalignment on untouched lines whenever a file was touched. Adds a --staged flag (wired in package.json lint-staged): in --staged check mode, violations are filtered to the author's staged-added lines via the shared stagedDiff.getStagedAddedLines helper (fail-closed on null detection -> whole-file); --fix and manual/non-staged checks stay whole-file. 18 tests green incl. a real-git --staged describe (grandfathered-untouched-not-flagged + staged-added-flagged). Dogfooded: the husky runs block-align --staged on this very commit. Stacked on #13718 (retarget to dev on its merge).
